CustomField.formula: IF( NOT ( ISBLANK( Actual_Start_Date__c ) ), ( Margin__c * (((DATE(YEAR(Actual_Start_Date__c), 12, 31) - Actual_Start_Date__c) + 1)/365)), ( Margin__c * (((DATE(YEAR(Target_Contract_Start_Date__c), 12, 31) - Target_Contract_Start_Date__c) + 1)/365)) )
CustomField.label: Contribution Margin
